room.caption: [G1-10] No Bo... I mean DT Player, I expect you to die.
room.creationCode:
if global.gameProgress>=400 and global.gameProgress<=409 global.gameProgress=410
backFollowFore=instance_create(0,0,oBackgroundFollow) backFollowFore.type=2 backFollowFore.backSet=backMarioD backFollowFore.xMoveScale=0.6 backFollowFore.yMoveScale=0.6 backFollowFore.depth=1499999
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh2MainA) sideChat=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh2SideA)
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(101) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)
